summary: Joel Spolsky announces a guest editorial he wrote for Inc. magazine about recruiting and internships. He expresses pride at being invited to contribute to a publication he reads cover-to-cover. He humorously notes that professional editing made his writing feel more polished than his usual blog style, and shares a photo of Fog Creek's previous summer interns.
key_points: Joel was invited to write a guest editorial for Inc. magazine on recruiting and internships
He considers Inc. a valuable resource for entrepreneurs and reads every issue thoroughly
Professional editing changed his voice slightly, making it feel more polished than his typical blog writing style
money_quotes: Inc. (the magazine) is a great resource for entrepreneurs. For the last several years, I've been reading it cover-to-cover the day it arrives.
Thanks to professional editing, it feels a little bit polished compared to my usual style.
key_insight: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Joel's Inc. magazine guest editorial on recruiting and internships, offering little substantive content beyond the referral itself.
